name: AI LinkedIn Posts — Research, Generate, Publish, Track & Email
description: Uses Exa to research a topic, Claude AI generates an engaging LinkedIn post, publishes it via LinkedIn API, logs the post to Google Sheets for tracking, and sends an email summary via Gmail.

source.originalName: AI-generated LinkedIn posts with OpenAI, Google Sheets & email approval workflow

topic.description: Topic for the LinkedIn post (e.g. 'AI agents transforming customer service')

emailTo.description: Email address to send the post summary to

tone.description: Desired tone for the post (e.g. 'thought leadership', 'casual', 'data-driven')

steps.name: Build AI prompt for LinkedIn post generation

code.source:
var ctx = $.steps.compileResearch.output;
var prompt = 'You are an expert LinkedIn content creator. Generate a compelling LinkedIn post about the following topic, using the research data provided.

TOPIC: ' + $.input.topic + '
TONE: ' + ($.input.tone || 'professional yet conversational') + '

RESEARCH:
' + ctx.context + '

Guidelines:
- Start with a strong hook (first 2 lines are critical for engagement)
- Use short paragraphs and line breaks for readability
- Include 2-3 specific data points or insights from the research
- End with a question or call-to-action to drive engagement
- Add 3-5 relevant hashtags at the end
- Keep under 1300 characters for optimal engagement
- Do NOT use emojis excessively (max 2-3)

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "postText": "The full LinkedIn post text",
  "hook": "The opening hook line",
  "hashtags": ["#hashtag1", "#hashtag2"],
  "estimatedReadTime": "X min"
}';
return { prompt };

steps.name: Run Claude AI to generate the post
Parse AI response and strip fences
